title: LMND: Morgan Stanley Upgrades Lemonade with Increased Price Target
text: Morgan Stanley upgrades Lemonade with increased price target March 17, 2026. Morgan Stanley upgraded rating from Equal-Weight (hold) to Overweight (buy). Price target raised from $80 to $85, representing 6.25% upside. Rationale: Partnership with Tesla to offer auto insurance provides significant competitive advantages. Morgan Stanley cited partnership gives Lemonade first-mover advantage in data analysis and real-world experience with autonomous vehicles. Firm projects substantial business scale amplification through Lemonade Car division as automotive sector transitions to autonomous vehicles. Analyst emphasis: Tesla data access and collaboration experience provide durable competitive moat. Historical precedent: Insurance companies with data advantages have sustained outperformance. Broader implications: Autonomy insurance market nascent but potentially massive if Tesla FSD adoption accelerates. Timing: Upgrade coincided with announcement of 50% rate reductions for Tesla FSD miles. Market reaction: LMND shares jumped 16.4% in afternoon session following upgrade. Shares continued higher through March.
